question: Which bib number is displayed on the athlete wearing the red and white athletic jersey? A. 4548 B. 1548 C. 214 D. 2010

Describe the appearance and actions of the athlete wearing the blue tank top during the shot put event.
canonical_answer: A male athlete with short brown hair wears a light blue sleeveless tank top with bib number 4548 and black shorts. He holds a red spherical shot put ball near his neck while twisting his body in preparation. He stands on a red track surface with rows of empty brown stadium seats visible in the background. Another person stretches nearby on a metal railing.

question: Which of the previously seen athletes is back on screen? A. man in black beanie and black jacket B. athlete in white tank top with black bib C. person in red and white jersey with bib 214 D. young man in blue sleeveless tank top with bib 1548

Describe the sequence of actions performed by the athlete in the blue tank top during the shot put event.
canonical_answer: At [0-2s], a man in a blue tank top holds a red shot put ball; at [6-8s], he twists his body while holding the ball near his neck; at [8-10s], he leans forward with his arm swinging back; at [10-12s], he straightens up and opens his mouth wide.
